description.ko: 현실의 경계가 우주 심연의 무한한 어둠 속으로 녹아드는, 우주 가장 먼 곳의 고요한 장엄함을 탐험하세요.
description.en: Explore the silent majesty of the furthest reaches of space, where the boundaries of reality dissolve into the infinite darkness of the cosmic deep.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a deep cosmic void, swirling obsidian and violet nebulae, distant flickering stars, a massive gravitational singularity pulling in trails of stardust, hyper-detailed, 8k resolution, ethereal and haunting atmosphere, cosmic deep aesthetic.
